generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that excessive defense spending actually weakens our national security? By focusing on strategic autonomy, we can ensure our country's safety without overburdening our economy. It's time to prioritize smart, responsible defense policies that protect our civil liberties and prepare us for real threats. #SmartDefense #NationalSecurity
